title: Ptit Eva School Please tell me this isnt true
display_title: Ptit Eva School Please tell me this isnt true
wikitext:
[]: [P'tit Eva @ School] Please tell me this isn't true!             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Thu Mar 08, 2007 12:51 am For the love of Raa, just... please... please let this be some sort of horrible early April Fools joke. No...

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Thu Mar 08, 2007 1:04 am I could understand a Gendo by himself sitting at his desk, because thats just funny and something you can put on your desk. But the rest are just not......right. It's like preschool EVA..

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 08, 2007 1:13 am I don't see anything on gainax's website.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Thu Mar 08, 2007 1:59 am I will shoot my own foot if this is not fake. Which i'm pretty sure it's fake, so I think my foot's safe.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Mar 08, 2007 2:10 am Nothing is beyond Gainax at this point.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Mar 08, 2007 5:05 am AnimeNewsService is reporting this as well. It is kinda early for an April Fool's joke, so it possibly could be the real deal. And this could be incredibly awesome. Or incredibly terrible.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Mar 08, 2007 5:15 am The fanboy in me wants to squeal and the human in me wants to gouge out my eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 08, 2007 6:51 am DO NOT WANT

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Mar 08, 2007 9:24 am It's got Rei II, Rei I and Rei IAO? Aww, the chibi-Israfel is cute.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Thu Mar 08, 2007 10:12 am Reichu wrote: DO NOT WANT

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Thu Mar 08, 2007 11:21 am Okay, I'm the minority here. I think they're really cute.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Mar 08, 2007 11:59 am Sweet. More useless shit for me to buy.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Mar 08, 2007 12:34 pm I want to cry. Anno should hang himself before this airs on TV.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Mar 08, 2007 1:23 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Sweet. More useless shit for me to buy.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Mar 08, 2007 3:40 pm It's just Gainax whoring out Eva again. I would think everyone would be used to stuff like this by now.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Mar 08, 2007 4:53 pm I don't see that this transcends the boundary of the usual crass Evangelion merchandising.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Mar 08, 2007 6:40 pm What the deuce would the plot be?! Eva show without Anno = EDIT: WOW, SD Unit 1... looks... wow.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Thu Mar 08, 2007 9:08 pm Heh. I bet it turns out to be better than Rebuild .

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Mar 08, 2007 10:29 pm thewayneiac wrote: Heh. I bet it turns out to be better than Rebuild .

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Thu Mar 08, 2007 10:30 pm
